title: Medical Sonographer

rationales.taskAutomation: AI-assisted measurement and biometry tools automate a real slice of image analysis, but probe placement and image acquisition remain a manual, operator-dependent skill.
rationales.toolMaturity: Automated biometry and AI image-quality tools are credible and improving, increasingly embedded in newer ultrasound systems.
rationales.adoption: Larger imaging centers and hospital systems are adopting AI-assisted measurement tools; broader adoption is still building.
rationales.agenticExposure: Agents can pre-populate standard measurements and flag image-quality issues, but acquiring a diagnostic-quality scan stays with the sonographer.

salarySource: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 29-2032 (Diagnostic Medical Sonographers), p25-p75 rounded
insight: AI now auto-populates standard measurements on many scans, but getting a diagnostic-quality image out of a moving probe against a moving patient is still a hands-on skill no model performs. Demand for sonographers keeps growing with imaging volume.
